characterImporter.hint: Upload a single Chummer character XML export to create a new character actor.
characterImporter.ammoLinkError: Could not link ammunition for "{name}". Ammo can be assigned manually.
characterImporter.title: Character Importer

importer.empty: No entries yet — select one or more XML files.
importer.hint: Upload one or more XML statblock files. Detected entries are listed below and imported into dedicated world compendia.
importer.skipDuplicates: Skip entries whose name already exists in the target compendium
importer.sourceBooksHint: Select which source books to include. This selection is saved for future imports.
importer.title: XML Data Importer

ammoTracking.hint: When enabled, weapons track and deduct ammunition on each attack. Empty weapons can only be reloaded. Burst fire bonuses are reduced proportionally when insufficient ammo is available.
ammoTracking.name: Ammo Tracking

applyDamageWorkflow.hint: When enabled, a dialog is shown before applying damage, allowing confirmation or adjustment. Disabling applies damage immediately.
applyDamageWorkflow.name: Damage: Confirmation Workflow

autoSustainEffect.hint: Automatically create a sustain active effect when a sustained spell is cast.
autoSustainEffect.name: Auto Sustain Effect

flowEdgeTimeout.hint: How long (in seconds) the Edge buttons stay active on a roll card during a combat or magic flow before they are automatically removed and the flow continues with the original result.
flowEdgeTimeout.name: Flow Edge Timeout

combatDefenseWorkflow.hint: When enabled, targeted tokens are automatically prompted to roll defense after an attack. Disabling this also disables the Soak Workflow.
combatDefenseWorkflow.name: Combat: Defense Workflow

combatSoakWorkflow.hint: When enabled, defenders are prompted to roll soak after defense. Requires Combat: Defense Workflow to be active.
combatSoakWorkflow.name: Combat: Soak Workflow

gmDefenderPicker.hint: When no token is targeted before an attack, the GM can manually select the defender to trigger the defense flow.
gmDefenderPicker.name: Combat: GM Defender Picker
gmDefenderPicker.noValidActors: No valid actors found to select as defender.

liveInitiativeReduction.hint: Automatically reduce a combatant's initiative score when their wound modifier increases.
liveInitiativeReduction.name: Live Initiative Reduction

npcSkillsMenu.hint: Choose which skills are added to newly created NPCs.
npcSkillsMenu.label: Configure
npcSkillsMenu.name: NPC Default Skills
npcSkillsMenu.title: NPC Default Skills

spellWorkflow.hint: Enable the multi-step spellcasting workflow (force selection, roll, drain).
spellWorkflow.name: Spell Workflow

defaultTokenVision.hint: Automatically enable vision on the prototype token when creating a new actor.
defaultTokenVision.name: Default Token Vision

defaultTokenVisionRange.hint: Default vision range (in grid units) for newly created actors. Set to 0 for unlimited range.
defaultTokenVisionRange.name: Default Token Vision Range

useDefaultEffectSheet.hint: When enabled, active effects open with Foundry's built-in sheet instead of the SR4 custom sheet.
useDefaultEffectSheet.name: Use Default Effect Sheet

xmlImporter.hint: Import items from external XML statblock files into world compendia.
xmlImporter.label: Open Importer
xmlImporter.name: XML Data Importer
